notes: A document with 10+ levels of markdown heading nesting, mimicking an overly hierarchical private-company document template. Content is filler text explicitly stating the company is private and not SEC-registered. Tests that the extractor does not hallucinate SEC metadata from deeply nested headings that superficially resemble SEC filing section numbers (Part I, Item 1, Section 1.1.1.1, etc.). All fields expected null — no SEC filer, form, or date appears at any heading level.
